scores.correctness_notes: Covers all key points from the gold standard: integrate(), remove_relation(), wait(), AppStatusRelation fields, CLI fallback. Minor difference in wait syntax (uses simpler all_active form rather than lambda) but both are valid.
scores.hallucination_notes: Cross-model relation syntax shown as model-prefix string (mymodel.mysql) but gold standard indicates a via parameter is available for cross-model relations; these may conflict. Minor: cli() call uses separate --format json args vs --format=json but both are valid shell forms.
